creator: kennethsalerno@yahoo.com
text: Also want to add I am running an older version of SLOF (packaged with QEMU 2.4.1) because the latest SLOF packaged with QEMU 2.10.2 fails to read superblock of boot disk (MBR/dos label) and cannot even bootstrap FreeBSD, so I have no way of knowing if this was fixed in a more current SLOF or not. But again, I need assistance to first determine if this is a compiler issue or SLOF issue.
